payload.prompt: Change the eye color of this character to a bright glowing red, keeping the difference in shades / brightness currently present in her eyes in this image.

constraints: Do not include action IDs, preconditions, expected_result, trace events, or manifest data.
Use existing layer and mask IDs from document_summary when targeting existing objects.
Provide a semantic output_layer_id or mask_id only when later actions need to reference it.
Use bbox_xyxy coordinates as half-open pixel bounds: [x0, y0, x1, y1].

items.description: One planner action. Its exact params are defined by available_actions.

payload.user_prompt: Change the eye color of this character to a bright glowing red, keeping the difference in shades / brightness currently present in her eyes in this image.

actions.description: Select darker blue pixels in viewer-left iris.
Select lighter blue pixels in viewer-left iris.
Select darker blue pixels in viewer-right iris.
Select lighter blue pixels in viewer-right iris.
Union all selected iris tone masks.
Remove tiny isolated selections.
Soften mask edges for antialiasing.
Colorize selected iris pixels red while preserving luminance.
Boost the red iris luminance for a bright glowing look while retaining shade differences.
Export final edited image.

raw_json.description: Select the blue iris tones in each eye, colorize them red while preserving luminance, then export.
